name: github-copilot-toolbox
description: GitHub Copilot Toolbox: MCP hub, workspace helpers, Intelligence context packs & readiness, and npx bridges from Cursor→Copilot. Workflow ideas credited in NOTICE (everything-claude-code, MIT).
author: amitchorasiya

GitHubCopilotToolBox.npxTag.description: npm dist-tag or version appended after @ for npx packages (e.g. latest or 1.0.1).

GitHubCopilotToolBox.useInsidersPaths.description: Resolve user mcp.json under VS Code Insiders instead of stable.

GitHubCopilotToolBox.intelligence.includ.description: Pre-select “Include git” in the Intelligence context pack quick pick (still confirm each run).
Pre-select “Include diagnostics” in the Intelligence context pack quick pick.

GitHubCopilotToolBox.intelligence.append.description: Pre-select “Append to session notepad” after building a context pack.

GitHubCopilotToolBox.intelligence.openCh.description: Pre-select “Open Copilot Chat” after building a context pack.

GitHubCopilotToolBox.intelligence.autoSc.description: When enabled, after a workspace folder opens (debounced): open the MCP & Skills awareness report, refresh hub data, and merge a replaceable MCP/skills section into .github/copilot-instructions.md. Also applies when you run the awareness scan while this is on.

GitHubCopilotToolBox.translateWrapMultil.description: When translating selection, wrap multiline result in a markdown code fence (language = active editor).
